name: Chicken with Lemon Grass and Chili- Ga Xao Xa Ot
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and dry it well. Cut into small pieces.
2. Peel the garlic and slice finely.
3. Cut the onion into halves lengthwise, then cut each half into 1/2 inch strips.
4. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
5. Add a pinch of salt, garlic, and onion to the pan. Fry until the onion is opaque.
6. Add lemon grass and chili. Cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
7. Add the chicken and cook until lightly browned.
8. Stir in fish sauce, sugar, and caramel sauce. Mix well.
9. Pour in 1 cup of water and continue cooking for 45 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Stir occasionally and add more water if needed.
Caramel Sauce:
1. In a heavy saucepan, mix together 1/2 cup sugar and 4 tablespoons water.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Continue boiling until the mixture changes color.
4. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking until brown.
5. Add an additional 1/2 cup of water to the mixture. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
6. Remove from heat and store in a jar in the refrigerator.
